refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide real-time productivity monitoring and automated cycle optimization to maintain throughput ≥ productivity_target (m³/h or ton/h).
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is a high-level KPI; refinement adds the functional mechanism (monitoring and optimization) necessary to influence the outcome.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Operational trial comparing manual operation vs. system-assisted operation against the productivity_target baseline.
sub_frs: Monitor material displacement volume and mass in real-time.
Optimize machine path and cycle timing based on site conditions.
Report productivity metrics to site management systems.

candidate_dps: Manual operator training and incentive programs
Integrated Payload Sensing and Autonomous Path Planning (IPS-APP)
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated Payload Sensing and Autonomous Path Planning (IPS-APP)

potential_sources: Safety Services intervention may override productivity-optimized paths.
coupling_check.notes: Decoupling is maintained by treating safety constraints as boundary conditions for the optimization algorithm.

assumptions_risks: Assumes sensor accuracy is sufficient for +/- 5% mass estimation.
Risk: High-latency network links may degrade real-time optimization.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure DP explicitly includes a 'Safety-Override' handshake to prevent coupling with Safety Services.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: The top-level system-of-systems wrapper that orchestrates vehicle telemetry and tasking logic.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives payload and position data from the Vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends optimized cycle instructions to the Vehicle or Tele-operator.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of the productivity logic and cross-module orchestration.
Provides data but does not own the cross-fleet productivity targets.
Only a consumer of the productivity guidance.
Constraint provider, not a productivity driver.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the optimization logic in the NGHE Solution module prevents logic duplication across individual Vehicles.
containment_risks: Logic diffusion if individual vehicle controllers attempt to override global optimization locally.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts for how 'Tasking' commands are prioritized at the Vehicle level.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The IPS-APP design parameter directly addresses the need for both measurement and achievement of productivity targets.

diffusion_risks: Potential for 'Tasking' logic to leak into the Teleoperation module if UI/UX is not strictly separated.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution is the appropriate container for the 'brain' of the productivity logic.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: High; telemetry data provides the necessary evidence for KPI verification.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation to the system-level module.

recommended_revisions: Formalize the 'Network Link' interface requirements to support the high-frequency telemetry needed for IPS-APP.

decision.justification: The high-level FR and DP are validated and assigned to the NGHE Solution module. Decomposition to the next level is required to define specific sub-functions for sensing, planning, and reporting.

assumptions: Productivity targets are static for the duration of a shift.
open_risks: Sensor fouling in harsh environments affecting payload accuracy.
